001/************************* PROJECT RON *************************/

005/***************************************************************/
006package com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.shooter;
007
008import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.*;
009
010import com.ctre.phoenix6.controls.Follower;
011import com.ctre.phoenix6.controls.VelocityTorqueCurrentFOC;
012import com.ctre.phoenix6.signals.MotorAlignmentValue;
013import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Motors;
014import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Ports;
015import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings;
016import com.stuypulse.robot.util.SysId;
017import com.stuypulse.robot.util.simulation.RobotVisualizer;
018import com.stuypulse.robot.util.simulation.TalonFXSimulation;
019import edu.wpi.first.math.system.plant.DCMotor;
020import edu.wpi.first.math.system.plant.LinearSystemId;
021import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.AngularVelocity;
022import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.Voltage;
023import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.simulation.FlywheelSim;
024import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.sysid.SysIdRoutine;
025import java.util.Optional;
026
027public class ShooterSim extends Shooter {
028
029    private final FlywheelSim shooterSim;
030
031    private final TalonFXSimulation shooterMotorLeft;
032
033    private final TalonFXSimulation shooterMotorCenter;
034
035    private final TalonFXSimulation shooterMotorRight;
036
037    private final VelocityTorqueCurrentFOC shooterController;
038
039    private final Follower shooterFollowerController;
040
041    private Optional<Voltage> voltageOverride;
042
043    public ShooterSim() {
044        shooterSim = new FlywheelSim(
045                LinearSystemId.createFlywheelSystem(
046                        DCMotor.getKrakenX60(3),
047                        Settings.Shooter.J.in(KilogramSquareMeters),
048                        Settings.Shooter.GEAR_RATIO),
049                DCMotor.getKrakenX60(3));
050        shooterMotorRight = new TalonFXSimulation(Ports.Shooter.SHOOTER_MOTOR_RIGHT, shooterSim);
051        shooterMotorCenter = new TalonFXSimulation(Ports.Shooter.SHOOTER_MOTOR_CENTER, shooterSim);
052        shooterMotorLeft = new TalonFXSimulation(Ports.Shooter.SHOOTER_MOTOR_LEFT, shooterSim);
053        // leader
054        Motors.Shooter.SHOOTER_MOTOR_RIGHT.configure(shooterMotorRight);
055        Motors.Shooter.SHOOTER_MOTOR_CENTER.configure(shooterMotorCenter);
056        Motors.Shooter.SHOOTER_MOTOR_LEFT.configure(shooterMotorLeft);
057        shooterController = new VelocityTorqueCurrentFOC(getState().getTargetAngularVelocity());
058        shooterFollowerController = new Follower(shooterMotorRight.getDeviceID(), MotorAlignmentValue.Opposed);
059        shooterMotorCenter.setControl(shooterFollowerController);
060        shooterMotorLeft.setControl(shooterFollowerController);
061        voltageOverride = Optional.empty();
062    }
063
064    @Override
065    public AngularVelocity getCurrentAngularVelocity() {
066        return shooterMotorRight.getVelocity().getValue();
067    }
068
069    @Override
070    protected void stopMotors() {
071        shooterMotorRight.stopMotor();
072        shooterMotorCenter.stopMotor();
073        shooterMotorLeft.stopMotor();
074        shooterMotorCenter.setControl(shooterFollowerController);
075        shooterMotorLeft.setControl(shooterFollowerController);
076    }
077
078    @Override
079    public void setVoltageOverride(Voltage voltage) {
080        this.voltageOverride = Optional.of(voltage);
081    }
082
083    @Override
084    public void periodic() {
085        if (!Settings.EnabledSubsystems.SHOOTER.get()) {
086            stopMotors();
087            return;
088        }
089        shooterMotorRight.setControl(
090                shooterController.withVelocity(
091                        getState().getTargetAngularVelocity().in(RotationsPerSecond)));
092        // leader first
093        shooterMotorRight.update(Settings.DT);
094        shooterMotorCenter.update(Settings.DT);
095        shooterMotorLeft.update(Settings.DT);
096        RobotVisualizer.getInstance().updateShooter(getCurrentAngularVelocity());
097        super.periodic();
098    }
099
100    public SysIdRoutine getShooterSysIdRoutine() {
101        return SysId.getRoutine(
102                Settings.Shooter.RAMP_RATE,
103                Settings.Shooter.STEP_VOLTAGE,
104                "Shooter",
105                voltage -> setVoltageOverride(voltage),
106                () -> shooterMotorLeft.getPosition().getValue(),
107                () -> shooterMotorLeft.getVelocity().getValue(),
108                () -> shooterMotorLeft.getMotorVoltage().getValue(),
109                getInstance());
110    }
111}
